heading: Effect on existing laws
label: 485j Effect on existing laws
text: The provisions of previous Acts of Congress not inconsistent with the provisions of this subchapter shall remain in full force and effect.
notes: Construction With Other Laws, , provided that:Act Aug. 4, 1939, ch. 418, § 1853 Stat. 1198“Nothing in this Act [see ] shall be construed to amend the Boulder Canyon Project Act (), as amended [section 617 et seq. of this title].”section 485k of this title45 Stat. 1057
